parameters: particle set yuge_1 this yuge def 8
The comforting scent of coffee wafts out.
Owner:
You look tired. Here, drink this coffee on the house.
Your body relaxes! The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
Owner:
No need to rush. You can take a moment to rest and unwind here.
Owner:
Everyone's end destination is the same. All we can do is walk the
path we prefer to get us there.
Coffee-Lover:
Mmm... As delicious as always. You know, I had a thought...
Coffee-Lover:
Working hard, buying a big house and expensive clothes...
That's what everyone says we should aim for.
Coffee-Lover:
But when did that start? When did we all start thinking it was
shameful not to earn loads of money as quickly as possible?
Coffee-Lover:
Maybe we're all just being played. For my part, I'm happiest sitting
here and enjoying a coffee all by myself.
Carefree Man:
What's going on with politics these days? *Munch* *Munch*...
Oh, right! The buttered toast's as delicious as ever, boss!
particle set yuge_2 this yuge def 8
Worker:
When I started working here, I finally felt like I'd found the life
I wanted to live.
Worker:
My whole life, I felt like I was chasing after something just out of
reach. Turns out I was only ever running in circles.
Worker:
Now I can sit down and enjoy a coffee. Being able to live my life at
my own pace is a real blessing.
